ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>The response is contextually relevant, maintains persona consistency with the Frontier Ranger's mission-focused nature but could improve naturalness.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TATAB>3<TAB>3<TAB>3<TAB>Overall quality is average due to lack of context relevance and a bit rigid in persona consistency, though it maintains some level of naturalness within the Ranger's dialect.
